title: Simple Translation
body:
# Simple Translation

This mod will display the translated item name when you press a specific key while displaying the item's tooltip. 


English → Japanese

![e-j](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/391/468/test.png)

Japanese(Automatic detection) → English

![e-j](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/391/472/2021-08-29_23h26_22.png)

In addition, it is possible to set any translation destination and translation source language from the config.

The default is blank to automatically detect the language.

Please use [Google's language code](https://cloud.google.com/translate/docs/languages) to specify the language


Requires Architectury API and Cloth Config API
Fabric only requires Fabric API in addition to the above
